key_patterns.DATA_LOGIC_MIXING: Many oversized files mix large static data objects with business logic. Solution: extract data to _data.ts/_constants.ts files, keep logic in main file.
key_patterns.SUB_COMPONENTS_INLINED: React components embed helper components (AreaCard, SexualidadeSection, etc.) as local functions. Solution: move to separate files in same directory.
key_patterns.BARREL_FILES: mapeamentos/index.ts (706L) re-exports from multiple sub-modules. Solution: verify it's a pure re-export barrel; if so, acceptable.
key_patterns.DUPLICATE_FILES: traducao-areas.ts exists at both root (739L) and portal grimoire (665L). Solution: deduplicate.
